headline: Wearables in Pharma & Biotech Research and Forecasts Report 2026-2031, Company Profiles and Market Strategies of Abbott, Dexcom, and Masimo
summary: The wearables in pharma & biotech market is forecasted to grow from USD 3.98 billion in 2026 to USD 9.97 billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 20.2%. This rapid growth is fueled by advances in biosensor technology, miniaturization, and digitization, supported by strong internet connectivity worldwide. Programs like "All of Us" and RPM adoption are boosting wearables' role in research and healthcare. headline: Redefining CGM for People With Type 2 Diabetes: Dexcom Announces Dexcom Flex in Germany
summary: SAN DIEGO & EDINBURGH, Scotland, May 18, 2026--DexCom, Inc. (Nasdaq: DXCM), a global leader in continuous glucose monitoring, today announced Dexcom Flex, a new CGM system designed specifically for adults with Type 2 diabetes who are not using intensive insulin therapy. The new system will be available in Germany soon.

headline: Stocks Set to Open Lower as Oil Rises Amid Iran Impasse, Nvidia Earnings and Fed Minutes Awaited
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are down -0.41%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are down -0.30% this morning, pointing to a lower open on Wall Street as oil prices continue to rise amid the stalemate between the U.S. and Iran.

headline: Barclays Maintains Underweight on DexCom, Lowers Price Target to $64
summary: Barclays  analyst Matt Miksic   maintains DexCom (NASDAQ:DXCM) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $67 to $64.
